allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
research: category creation strategies for unfounded markets

Analyzes precedents \(Kindle, Peloton, Headspace, Serial, Bandersnatch\),
extracts playbook for creating demand in markets that don't exist yet.
Maps dezibel-specific application across 5 strategy pillars.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)"2)

Bash(git commit -m "research: category creation strategies for unfounded markets

Analyzes precedents \(Kindle, Peloton, Headspace, Serial, Bandersnatch\),
extracts playbook for creating demand in markets that do not exist yet.
Maps dezibel-specific application across 5 strategy pillars.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git add knowledge/pre-seed.yml notes/areas/ notes/inbox/ notes/journal/2026-03-24.md notes/positions/2026-03-24-pos-accessibility-to-art-and-culture.md notes/positions/2026-03-24-pos-claude-organizes-not-writes.md notes/positions/2026-03-24-pos-division-of-labor-dezibel.md notes/positions/2026-03-25-pos-storytelling-as-positive-example.md repos/dezibel-legal.yml repos/dezibel-marketing.yml repos/dezibel.yml .claude/settings.json .claude/skills/ && git commit -m "dezibel strategic command layer: project note, 10 positions, area wiring

Built brain as strategic oversight for dezibel across 4 repos.
Project note tracks all 11 tracks, team, revenue model, critical path.
Positions track every open decision: raise strategy, casting, architecture,
Twilio compliance, pricing, validation, brand positioning.
Also includes onboarding content, SKILL.md permission fixes, and repo registrations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")
